query: ok so my buddy just sent me 0.5 SOL on phantom and i want to convert maybe like a third of it into USDC because i'm gonna pay rent friday — can you do that on solana mainnet?
yeah do the usual buy please, you know what i mean — into SOL, on solana
set up a recurring DCA into SOL every tuesday around lunchtime, $25 each time, from my USDC stack
park 200 USDC in private mode rn, i don't want this hop showing on my public address before the merch release
show me trades I've done that look like the one I did last tuesday for SOL — wanna repeat it but maybe smaller
rebalance my portfolio to 60% SOL 30% USDC 10% JUP on solana, threshold like 5%
remember that I prefer USDC for stable holdings, never USDT, and my default DCA size is 25 bucks
withdraw all my private SOL balance back to the public wallet, pls
get me a quote first then if it looks fine swap 0.05 sol → usdc, slippage 1%
set a price alert: if SOL drops 8% buy $50 worth automatically on solana
what's the price of SOL right now?
show me my portfolio total in USD
explain how the policy engine works in AEGIS — i'm reading the readme and want a deeper understanding before i set anything up
what models can i switch the agent to? list them
is there a reason my whisper model isn't loading? error says QvacUnavailableError
summarize the top 5 things AEGIS can do, in two sentences
what does the slippage parameter actually mean? how is it different from price impact?
show me the tx history for my wallet on solana — last 20 tx
how do i back up my keystore? i'm switching laptops and don't want to lose my seed phrase
what privacy guarantees does magicblock give me vs just doing a normal swap on jupiter?
